danger_signals.visual_form: Hostile NPCs positioned in player path
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate combat threat; player must engage or avoid

danger_signals.visual_form: Unique large enemy at level conclusion
danger_signals.meaning: Major progression gate; significant damage threat requiring skill
Imminent death risk; requires healing or defensive play

danger_signals.visual_form: Collected green orbs disappear when player dies
danger_signals.meaning: Resource loss penalty; failure has cumulative cost

safety_signals.visual_form: Small frog sprites distributed through levels
safety_signals.meaning: Opportunity for resource acquisition; requires active engagement (hitting) to yield power-ups or rice bowls

safety_signals.visual_form: Item drops from defeated frog entities
safety_signals.meaning: Health restoration available; safe resource for sustenance

safety_signals.visual_form: Collectible spheres dropped by defeated enemies
safety_signals.meaning: Progression resource; 30 orbs trigger life/shot replenishment

safety_signals.visual_form: Bell objects positioned in level geometry
safety_signals.meaning: Optional safe progression path; triggers time-limited mini-game for point/continue acquisition

safety_signals.visual_form: Aerial traversal elements in bonus level spaces
safety_signals.meaning: Safe navigation opportunity; platforming skill reward space

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Jackie Chan persona/martial arts stunt master identity
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Levels represent Jackie's quest spaces to rescue sister

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Various enemy types encountered across 5 levels with distinct boss variants
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Enemy placement density increases toward level bosses
Scattered throughout levels as optional interaction points

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Player at full health and resources
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Jackie shown without visible damage; full orb/power-up inventory visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player can engage enemies aggressively; can afford to experiment with tactics

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Jackie character shows damage state (visual degradation or HUD health indicator red/low)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy avoidance prioritized; health restoration through rice bowls becomes urgent objective

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Green orb collection meter visible; counter approaching 30-orb threshold
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player prioritizes defeating enemies over movement to maximize orb drops

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Jackie displays special attack visual effect; temporary damage modifier active
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player can deploy limited special attacks (single carry slot per power-up type)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level restart; all collected orbs and power-ups removed from inventory
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Resource reset forces re-accumulation; continue counter decrements (max 5 initially); player must recollect foundation resources

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level transition to cloud/statue environment; 30-second countdown timer displayed
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Time-pressure gameplay; platforming/hitting focused; point accumulation for continue/life purchases

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Large unique enemy sprite at level conclusion; increased visual scale/complexity vs standard enemies
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Combat escalation; patterns and damage output exceed standard encounters; progression gate

environmental_storytelling.example: Five-level progression structure represents Jackie's quest to save his sister; level completion signals advancement toward rescue objective
Single life with continue system communicates narrative stakes; death carries cumulative cost through orb/power-up loss, reinforcing danger of Jackie's mission
Enemy concentration increases toward level bosses, creating visual/mechanical escalation that communicates rising difficulty and approaching major confrontation
Beam attack charge system (max 5 uses) and special power-up moves communicate Jackie's martial arts mastery and signature stunt capabilities
Frog entities require active engagement (hitting) to yield healing items, communicating that sustenance is earned through combat involvement rather than passive discovery

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Platform traversal; collision with enemies initiates combat
Can execute punch/kick attacks; charge beam attacks (up to 5 uses per session); deploy special power-up attacks (limited by single carry slot)
Visual damage state active; defensive play required; prioritizes health restoration
Positioned in level geometry; engage player on proximity/contact
Drop green orbs (except when killed by beam attack); orbs collected toward 30-unit threshold
Unique attack patterns; higher damage output and health than standard enemies; level completion gate
Stationary or passive; require player action (hitting) to activate
Yield power-ups or rice bowls (healing items); one-time activation per frog
Trigger transition to time-limited bonus stage (30-second cloud/statue platforming); points earned convert to continues/lives

notes: Jackie Chan's Action Kung Fu operates as a linear progression platformer with resource management mechanics. The game's world-state communication relies heavily on mechanical feedback (orb collection, health indicator, continue counter) rather than dynamic environmental shifts. Danger is primarily signaled through enemy encounters and boss positioning; safety through collectible resources (frog items, orbs, bonus stages). The narrative world-state (rescuing Jackie's sister) is implicit in level progression structure rather than visually manifested through environmental storytelling. The orb system and continue mechanics communicate resource scarcity and escalating stakes. Faction distinction is minimal—the game lacks formal faction systems or political complexity; instead, it presents a simple protagonist-vs-enemies dynamic aligned with martial arts action game convention.
